name: Apple Orange Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 large unpeeled baking apples, cored and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Process apples, oranges, and raisins in a blender or food processor until finely chopped. Set aside.
2. Cream shortening and sugar in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat until the mixture is light and fluffy.
4. Stir in lemon extract.
5. Combine dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt) separately.
6. Alternately add the dry mixture and orange juice to the creamed mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Stir in the fruit mixture and chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter evenly into 3 greased 8-inch by 4-inch loaf pans.
9. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
